Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Establishing Admissions
Off Calendar Jun-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. 2. Defendant's motion for order establishing admissions granted; the matters set forth in defendant's request for admissions nos. 1 through 11, inclusive, are deemed admitted. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories-General
Off Calendar Jun-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. 1. Defendant Citi funding Group, Inc.'s motion to compel responses to form interrogatories granted:
a. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Within ten days of the date of service of this order, plaintiff shall serve full, complete and verified responses to defendant's form interrogatories. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CITI FUNDING GROUP, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Appearances: Plaintiff in Pro Per Sean Wu, appearing. There are no other appearances. Plaintiff failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

Appearances: Daniel Ray Bacon, Attorney at Law, (415) 864-0907, appearing and moving party. Sean Su Plaintiff, also appearing and not opposing motion.
